awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: A curated list of awesome AutoHotkey libraries, library distributions, scripts, tools and resources.
awesomeListMeta.description: A curated list of awesome AutoHotkey libraries, library distributions, scripts, tools and resources.

nodes.itemHTML: • AHK_X11stars484 A rudimentary but functional implementation of AutoHotkey v1.0.24 for Linux by phil294. Forum
• AutoHotkey Plus Plus AutoHotkey IntelliSense, debug, and language support for VS Code, forked by Mark Wiemer from AutoHotkey Plus by cweijan
• Keysharp - Continuation of IronAHK by mfeemster. Forum
• Rufaydium WebDriverstars42 - by Xeo786 - Webdriver Library to support any Chromium based browser only requiring webdriver (no selenium/websocket) - Forum link
• SpicyKeys - Use hotkeys to open or move/copy selected files in Windows Explorer. Forum thread: link
• autohotkey.com/foundation - Official webpage of AutoHotkey Foundation LLC, a non-profit LLC (Limited Liability Company) founded for this software. Certificate of Organization (pdf) link.
• QuickAccessPopup - Multi purpose launcher and file switcher. Website link.

• ImagePutstars41 - by iseahound - Image library for converting to files, streams, windows, base64, urls, cursors, screen coordinates, clipboard, pointers, handles, and more. Supports AutoHotkey v1 and v2. - Forum thread: link
• Adventure (formerly AutoGUI) - by Alguimist - AHK IDE with useful built-in plugins and GUI designer.
• Adventure (formerly AutoGUI) - by Alguimist - WYSIWIG GUI Designer and Script Editor.
• Static Handsstars30 - Super useful shortcuts with the CapsLock key that spare the need to move hands while typing. Super simple. No learning curve.
• DateHotkeystars15 - Hotkey to easily receive current, past or upcomming date strings. Forum thread: link
• ClipBoardMonitor - Monitor clipboard changes, show tooltip of word count for text or a temporary GUI for pictures.
• AutoHotkey.pystars46 - Write AutoHotkey scripts in Python - Forum thread: link
• AutoHotkey_H - AHK_H adds functionality to original AutoHotkey and offers true multi-threading using NewThread() function or AutoHotkey.dll. Full list of v1 changes + Full list of v2 changes
• Chrome.ahkstars246 - by G33kDude - Automate Google Chrome using native AutoHotkey - Forum link
• FTPstars4 - by jNizM - AutoHotkey wrapper for FTP Sessions (Class) - Forum link
• LBEXstars16 - by just me - a collection of utility functions for ListBoxes. Forum thread: link
• TransparentListBoxstars13 - by just Me - Provides transparent listbox controls for AHK GUIs. Forum thread: link
• Neutronstars135 - by G33kDude - Set of tools for build HTML-based user interfaces with AutoHotkey. Forum thread: link
• Open-Show-Appsstars100 - Open, restore or minimize the desired Window's or Chrome's Apps. Forum thread: link
• AHKDbstars13 - by AHKDb - A database library for tab-separated data.
• ahkstars550 - A Python wrapper for AutoHotkey - Forum thread: link
• classMemorystars49 - by RHCP (Kalamity) - An AHK memory reading/writing class with pattern scans. Forum thread: link
• Facadestars29 - by Shambles - A Set of Functional Programming Libraries. - Forum thread: link
• HashTablestars9 - by Shambles - A Hash Table Implementation for AutoHotkey.
• LibCryptstars51 - by different authors - A collection of crypting and encoding functions.
• Type_Checkingstars5 - by Shambles - Type Checking for AutoHotkey - Forum thread: link
• Leya - MySQL APIstars16 - by kevgk - Work with MySQL databases in autohotkey, without exposing server credentials to the client.
• VSCode extension - Visual Studio Code (VSCode) plugin to add syntax highlighting for AutoHotkey.
• CL3stars61 - A clipboard manager (text only) with plugins (Search, predefined Slots, ClipChain, FIFO, Editor and more). Forum thread link.
• AHK_ctablestars7 - by hoppfrosch - Library to handle strings in tabular format - Forum thread: link.
• CSVstars38 - by trueski/kdoske - Library to work with CSV files and Listview functions. Forum thread: link.
• List manipulation functions - by Laszlo - Function library to manipulate comma delimited lists. Forum thread: link.
• ObjCSVstars23 - by JnLlnd - Library to load/save CSV files to Objects and and Listview functions. Forum thread: link.
• Tablestars6 - by VxE - Library to manipulate strings in tabular (TSV) format and Listview functions. Forum thread: link.
• XAstars13 - by trueski/hi5 - Serialize/deserialize array to/from XML. Forum thread: link.
• AHKv2-GDIPstars80 - Update of the above GDI+ library compatiable with both AHK v1.1 and AHK v2 - Forum thread: link.
• KeyPress OSDstars219 - On-Screen Display which displays every key or mouse button press at a clearly visible text size. Forum thread: link
• SVGraphstars10 - by CapnOdin - SVGraph bringing graphing and charting to AutoHotkey. Forum link
• gdiChartLibstars11 - by nnnik - a gdip chart lib for autohotkey. Forum link
• Automatic Window Manager - Save and restore last window position for each process. Forum thread: link
• Achromatic - ProgressPlatformer - Platform game. Forum thread: link, GitHub: linkstars14
• AHK Mahjong Solitaire - Mahjong game. Forum thread: link
• F1 Racer - 2 or 4 player racing game. Forum thread: link
• Infection - Board game. Also known as Ataxx. Forum thread: link
• Ishido - Retro puzzle game. Forum thread: link, GitHub: linkstars3
• ManyTetris - Multiple Tetris variants. Forum thread: link
• Out of the Sea - Try to avoid being fished by evolving. GitHub: linkstars4
• PABI Logical - Remake of the amiga game Logical. Forum thread: link, GitHub: linkstars3
• Sudoku - Sudoku game and solver. Forum thread: link
• WinSpy - by Alguimist - Useful window spy / information tool written in AHK.

• Vista Audio Control Functionsstars15 - by Lexikos - Provides alternatives to some SoundSet/SoundGet subcommands, as well as some additional features that SoundSet/SoundGet do not support. Forum thread: Link
• WebSocket.ahkstars43 - by GeekDude - Class based WebSocket library - Forum link
• Socket.ahkstars51 - by GeekDude - Socket library based on Bentschi's - Forum link

• AEIstars11 - by joedf - Displays AutoHotkey Environment Information and AHK support relevant System Information with a fancy update checker that auto-downloads with a progress bar. Forum thread: link.
• iWB2 Learner - by jethrow - iWB2 Learner is a tool for gathering information about Internet Explorer webpages. Forum thread: link
• AHK-EXE-Swapper - by evilC - Swap AHK version quickly! Forum thread: link.
• MagicBox - by Alguimist - MagicBox is a development tool to assist in the creation of message boxes. Forum thread: link.
• Particle Systemstars14 - by tidbit - A simple class to add particles to your GUI or onto your screen, using GDI+. Forum thread: link.
• Class_ScrollGUIstars17 - by just me - Creates a scrollable GUI as a parent for AHK GUI windows. Forum thread: link
• JoystickWrapper - by evilC - Full event-based, 8 axis, 128 button, 4 POV joystick reading (C# DLL, Uses Lexikos' CLR).
• Time() - by HotkeyIt - Count Days, hours, minutes, seconds between dates. Forum thread: link
• AutoHotkey build for CE - AutoHotkey for Pocket PCs / WinCE / Smartphones. Forum thread: link. Documentation link.
• Vim autohotkey-ahkstars15 - Vim plugin to add syntax highlighting for AutoHotkey.
• calc() - math expression evaluation incl brackets.
• MS Office COM Basics - Using AutoHotkey with MS Office.
• Edit v2.0 - by jballi - Library for the lightweight and surprisingly powerful default Edit control for displaying and editing text. Forum thread: link

• Unit Converter - unit converter that has most common English and scientific units and most common quantities from length to density to thermal conductivity. Also includes a section for physical and mathematic constants.
• GoToTilla - Addon which allows jumping to tokens within AHK source code.
• WinSCP.ahkstars17 - by Lipkau - Lib allows the use of WinSCP in AHK
• CGUIstars17 - by ChrisS85 - An object-oriented GUI library for AutoHotkey. Forum thread: link
• Sublime 4 AutoHotkey - Sublime 4 AutoHotkey is a patch for Sublime Text text editor which adds support for AutoHotkey. - (discontinued)
• vim-AHKcompletestars13 - Vim plugin to add auto-completion. (omni-completion)

• AutoHotkey.dll - Part of the AutoHotkey_H distribution. Load the autohotkey.dll from your other language, and pass normal AHK code to the dll file for execution. See here for a list of the exported functions. Some older links: python example, c/c++ example, forum link
• CbAutoCompletestars16 - by Pulover - Auto-completes typed values in an AHK ComboBox. Forum thread: link
• LV_Rowsstars14 - by Pulover - Additional functions for AHK ListView controls. Forum thread: link
• Evalstars24 - by Pulover - Evaluate expressions in strings. Forum thread: link
• PYAHK - Documentation link.
• Rebarstars15 - by Pulover - AHK class for AutoHotkey Rebar custom controls. Forum thread: link
• Toolbarstars27 - by Pulover - AHK Class for AutoHotkey Toolbar custom controls. Forum thread: link
• Socket Class (überarbeitet) - by Bentschi - Class based sockets library. Supports TCP and UDP.
• BarChart - by Learning One - Library for making bar charts. Download link.
• Radial Menu - Powerful hotkey, launcher, mouse gestures system, and much more (skinable) - Forum thread: link
• Lintalist - Searchable interactive lists to copy & paste text with plugins. Forum thread: link.

• WindowPadXstars208 - tool which provides some useful functionality within multi monitor environments. WindowPadX is an enhancement of WindowPad, originally released by Lexikos, see original forum thread: link
• LV_InCellEditstars11 - by just Me - In-cell editing for ListView controls. Forum thread: link
• AutoHotkey decompiler - for AHK 1.1+ Forum thread: link.
• Belvederestars160 - sets up rules for taking actions on files (move, copy, delete, etc) based on the name of a file, its extension, size, age, and more. More info link.
• Min2Tray - Minimize window to tray & more. Forum thread: link
• LibLua - Note: lua.ahk and lua_ahkfunctions.ahk can be found here.
• PAHK - Forum thread: link.

• SnapX - Enhances Windows/Aero Snap by taking over its hotkeys (Win+Left/Right, etc) and providing more fine-grained control over snap location and size. Works with multiple monitors, resolutions, and DPI levels.
• AHKsockstars64 - by TheGood - Function based sockets library. Supports TCP. Forum link
• Monster - evaluate math expressions in strings (calculator).

• Half-QWERTY - One-handed Typing. Using the space bar as a modifier, the user can generate the characters of either side of a full-sized keyboard using only one hand. More information via Forum thread: link
• Thumbscript - Allows you to type using the number pad, with only 2 number presses for every letter. Documentation: link
• WinClip - by Deo - WinClip is a clipboard manipulation class extending AutoHotkey's clipboard capabilities including support for RTF, HTML and images. Forum thread: link.

• AHKonsolestars30 - by G33kdude - Class based AutoHotkey library for console support. This library enables you to create an object representing a console to interact with, as well as multiple console buffer objects to facilitate in double buffering. Forum thread: link.

• LibConstars53 - by joedf - AutoHotkey Library For Console Support. This library enables you to write console applications and interact with other console instances. Basically, this library facilitates anything that has to do with writing and interacting with consoles. Forum thread: link.
• AutoHotkey-JSONstars193 - by cocobelgica - JSON lib for AutoHotkey. Forum thread: link.
• ObjDump/ObjLoad - by HotKeyIt - Serialize/deserialize object to/from variable/memory.
• SerDesstars12 - by cocobelgica - Serialize / de-serialize an AutoHotkey object structure. Forum thread: link.
• ahkDBAstars51 - by IsNull - An OOP-SQL database access framework. Forum thread: link.
• Class_SQLiteDBstars86 - by just Me - AHK SQLite API wrapper class. Forum thread: link.
• FileGetProperties - by kon - Functions for retrieving extended file properties.
• GDIpstars121 - by tic - Full featured library that helps in interaction with Microsoft's gdiplus.dll - Forum thread: link.
• GDIp_ImageSearch - by tic - Library using gdiplus.dll for searching image instances on the screen. See the end of that thread for MasterFocus' improved version, or see his GitHub repo here
• Simple GDI class - by GeekDude - A class aiming to make using low-level GDI functions simple.
• AutoXYWH - by tmplinshi - Move and resize controls automatically when a GUI is resized.
• TaskDialogstars11 - by just Me - enhanced MsgBox for Win Vista+ - link
• OnWin - by cocobelgica - Call function on window event (WinWaitXXX async). Forum thread: link
• LV_Colorsstars22 - by just Me - Individual background and/or text colours for a GUI ListView's cells or rows. Forum thread: link
• LV_EXstars13 - by just me - Some additional functions for AHK GUI ListView controls. Forum thread: link
• [Lib] Menu - by just me - Some functions related to AHK menus. Forum thread: link
• CHotkeyControl - by evilC - Replacement for AHK hotkey GuiControl that supports mouse buttons etc (Partially mature).
• HParse - by Avi - Function to convert meaningful shortcuts (Ctrl+X) to AutoHotkey syntax (^x).
• CvJoyInterface - by evilC - Control a vJoy virtual joystick using AHK.
• XInput - by Lexikos - Read XBOX gamepads using XInput (Only way to independently read L/R triggers), control rumble motors.
• Scientific Maths - by Avi - Library facilitating high precision mathematics.
• AHKhttpstars69 - Basic HTTP Server. Forum link
• Excel Charts - by Xx7 - Library for creating a graph in Excel, save the graph as an image and display it in a GUI.
• XGraph - by SKAN - Function library for graphically plotting real time data.
• RunAsTask - by SKAN - Auto-elevates script without UAC prompt.
• String Things - by tidbit - Stand-alone string manipulation functions.
• TFstars110 - by hi5 - Functions for manipulation of text files such as *.txt, *.ahk, *.html, *.css etc and Strings (or variables). Forum thread: link.
• Clipjump - is a Multiple-Clipboard management utility for Windows. Source code: GitHubstars337. Forum threads: link 1, link 2.
• Fun with GDIPlus - Interesting GDI+ examples.
• Examples of Non-Standard GUIs (ActiveX, GDI, etc.) - Examples of GUIs using non-standard methods to produce beautiful user interfaces.
• EitherMouse - Multiple mice, individual settings, auto swap mouse buttons on second mouse. Forum thread: link.
• AutoCompletestars162 - Suggests and completes words as you type. Forum thread: link.
• Portable Keyboard Layout - helps people to learn better, more efficient keyboard layouts such as Dvorak, Colemak or Asset. Forum thread: link.
• TypingAid - Suggests and completes words as you type. Forum thread: link GitHub linkstars105.
• bug.nstars3.1k - Tiling Window Manager. Forum thread: link
• AutoHotkey - AutoHotkey interpreter installer and binaries.
• AutoHotkey DLLstars57 - AutoHotkey.dll opens the world of AutoHotkey to other programming and scripting languages. Forum thread: link. Documentation link.
• [Class] Console - This class is meant to simplify debugging for scripts from simple text handling, to outputting and logging data & arrays. GitHub linkstars19.
• Print Array - Function that prints array content in GUI.
• AutoHotkey decompiler - classic - for AHK 1.0 does not work with password or /nodecompile protected files.
• AHK Studio - SciLexer.dll based IDE for AutoHotkey.
• AutoHotFlow - Draw your applications. Forum thread: link. GitHub linkstars59.
• DRAKON Editor - Visual programming (with DRAKON diagrams) for AutoHotkey.
• Notepad++ for AutoHotkey - Setup for popular code editor Notepad++ for AutoHotkey.
• GUI Creator (formerly Basic GUI Creator) - WYSIWYG GUI Creator for AutoHotkey.
• Pulover’s Macro Creator - a Free Automation Tool and Script Generator. Recommended for beginners. Forum thread: link. GitHub linkstars1.2k.
• PrismJs - Lightweight minimal AutoHotkey syntax highlighting.
• GoTo - Addon for any text editor that helps you jump to labels, hotkeys, hotstrings and functions in the active file.
• Context sensitive help in any editor - Addon for any text editor that provides context sensitive help by pressing F1.
• CodeQuickTester - by GeekDude - A lightweight dynamic code tester.
• .NET Framework Interop (CLR, C#, VB) - Forum thread: link.

• ActiveScript - Host VBScript and JScript in-process - Provides an interface to Active Scripting languages like VBScript and JScript, without relying on Microsoft's ScriptControl, which is not available to 64-bit programs.
• Exo-Javascriptstars113 - Write AHK with JavaScript - Forum thread: link, Exo-CLI (Interactive Command-line) linkstars10.
• Machine code functions: Bit Wizardry - Tutorial link, C/C++ to MCode Generator forum link.
• Embed Perl - Forum thread: link.
• Classes in AHK, Basic tutorial - AutoHotkey classes basic tutorial.
• Classes in AHK, a Dissection (Advanced) - AutoHotkey classes advanced tutorial.
• Use HTML and CSS for your GUIs! - Using HTML and CSS for creating GUIs.
• MCode Tutorial - MCode (machine code) tutorial.
• Official documentation - Official uptodate AutoHotkey documentation. GitHub linkstars263.
• ahkbook - a book on AutoHotkey (not completed yet). Forum thread: link.
• Official quick start tutorial - Official quick start tutorial - originally written by tidbit. Forum thread: link.
• autohotkey.com - Official website of the AutoHotkey scripting language (downloads, forum, documentation).
• highlight.js - A syntax highlighter written in JavaScript supporting more than 130 languages (including AutoHotkey).
• Yunitstars40 - by Uberi and infogulch - Simple unit testing framework for AutoHotkey.
• MouseGestureL - Control applications by mouse gestures. Gestures and actions can be defined via customizable interface. Documentation in English and Japanese - Japanese Homepage link
• ASPDMstars58 - package/stdlib distribution and management from the ahkscript folks. Trello link.
• pAHKlightstars36 - Your Lightweight Guide to AutoHotkey libraries, classes, functions and tools.
• ahkscript GitHub organization - Official ahkscript GitHub organization.
• IronAHKstars389 - Cross platform .NET rewrite - unfinished.

• SublimeAutoHotkeystars205 - AutoHotkey AHK language package for SublimeText including syntax highlighting, comments toggling, auto-completions, build system definitions, commands for ahkrun, ahkcompile, ahkrunpiped.
• Syntax Highlighterstars9 - Legacy syntax highlighter for AutoHotkey with default support for line numbers.
• ahk-libsstars138 - Ryan Shipp's collection of libraries.
• SciTE4AutoHotkey - SciTE-based IDE for AutoHotkey.
